title: Liberty Awareness Refresh Performance Audit
scope: Audit only; no runtime, UI, county status, Dispatch Board, directional, or onboarding changes.
finalDetermination: LIBERTY AWARENESS REFRESH PERFORMANCE AUDIT — BLOCKED

v732ObservedRefresh.activeIncidentContext: Only 2 active incidents were reported in the V732 evidence.

helperCoverage.gridlyRefreshBreakdownAudit: Available; exposes child durations, item counts, cache reuse, DOM skip counts, route-intelligence state, and recommendations.
helperCoverage.gridlyBackgroundLoopAudit: Available; exposes top-panel write/owner-check counts, repeated same-value write suppression, active timers, suspected loops, and callers.
helperCoverage.gridlyAuditPerformanceReview: Available; performance review helper present, dependent on populated runtime measurements.
helperCoverage.gridlyUiSmokeTest: Available; smoke/helper availability only, not sufficient for timing root cause.

staticFindings.slowestFunction: refreshPortraitV2LocalizedIntelligence in V732 observed evidence, with refreshGridlyCommunityPulseSharedModel statistically equivalent.
staticFindings.highestConfidenceRootCause: Repeated full rebuilds of Community Pulse / active-awareness / localized-intelligence model inputs during each Liberty refresh cycle, with insufficient unchanged-input reuse at the shared Community Pulse boundary and fallback localized commute-intelligence paths.
staticFindings.routeWatchInactiveWorkRisk: Route hazard scoring is guarded by routeWatchActivated, but per-incident route relevance checks can still execute in commute consequence mapping and should be verified/short-circuited only if helper evidence confirms material cost.
staticFindings.domWriteOrOwnershipOverhead: Contributing but not primary; same-value top-panel writes are suppressed and owner diagnostics are auditable.
staticFindings.libertySpecificity: Pattern is platform-wide, but Liberty is most exposed because production road geometry has 8407 road segment features and launch traffic depends on Liberty refresh latency.

requiredAnswers.highestConfidenceRootCause: Repeated unchanged-input rebuild of Community Pulse / Awareness / localized-intelligence models, amplified by road/corridor/incident lookup work.
requiredAnswers.smallestSafeV734Fix: Add compact unchanged-input model reuse at refreshGridlyCommunityPulseSharedModel/buildGridlyCommunityPulseModel boundary and have refreshPortraitV2LocalizedIntelligence consume the reused model; cache category-only localized fallback by active-detail signature.
requiredAnswers.v734PerformanceTarget: Same physical-device scenario: total Liberty refresh under 5000ms p95; refreshGridlyCommunityPulseSharedModel and refreshPortraitV2LocalizedIntelligence each under 1500ms p95; renderUnifiedIncidents under 500ms with two active incidents.
requiredAnswers.dispatchBoardSafeBeforeFix: No. Dispatch Board work should wait until the Liberty refresh blocker is fixed and validated.

countyBoundaryScopeUnchanged.montgomery: Maintenance Mode; unchanged by this audit
countyBoundaryScopeUnchanged.sanJacinto: Maintenance Mode; unchanged by this audit

recommendedV734Scope: Compact signature cache for shared Community Pulse / active-awareness model.
Portrait refresh consumes cached shared model on unchanged inputs.
Cache category-only localized fallback by active-detail signature.
Use existing helpers to validate route watch idle cost and refresh child timings.
No Dispatch Board, county status, UI behavior, directional, or onboarding changes.
deniseValidationSteps: Open Liberty on the same physical device/profile used for V732.

Run gridlyRefreshBreakdownAudit(), gridlyBackgroundLoopAudit(), gridlyAuditPerformanceReview(), gridlyUiSmokeTest(), gridlyActiveHazardCountReconciliationAudit(), gridlyRouteIntelligenceDebug(), and gridlyRouteWatchDebug().
Confirm total refresh under 5000ms, Community Pulse and portrait intelligence each under 1500ms, renderUnifiedIncidents under 500ms with two active incidents, and routeIntelligenceState idle.
